_publications._publicationTitle: Multidimensional Immunotyping of Human NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors Uncovers Tumor-Associated Macrophages as Key Drivers of Immune Evasion in the Tumor Microenvironment.

_contextSnippet: Additionally, we observed high expression of several other immunosuppressive markers in the tumor-infiltrating M2-like macrophages, including arginase-1 (ARG-1), CSF1R, and PD-L1, although there is intertumoral heterogeneity
details: Successfully detected immunosuppressive marker on tumor-infiltrating M2-like macrophages; showed high expression with intertumoral heterogeneity
